title: phyllanthus guillauminii
intro: Phyllanthus guillauminii, also known as the Guillaumin's gooseberry or the Puna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, native to Madagascar. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to protect against various diseases and conditions. The health benefits of Phyllanthus guillauminii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus guillauminii may include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
